about: I am Mohamed Yusuff, an aspiring Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer pursuing B.Tech in Information Technology at Easwari Engineering College. Passionate about problem-solving and technology, I have hands-on experience in Python, Django, FastAPI, and AI/ML projects. I am eager to work across tech stacks—from full-stack development to data science and cloud solutions—as a Software Engineer Intern, and grow into a Software Engineer Trainee.
Name: Mohamed Yusuff S
